[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0011000 2
2 0000000 a
3 0110100 3
4 0001001 2
5 0000000 a
6 0101100 3
7 0000000 a

01 0110100 3 match 3
